steps.title: Determine the slope sign
steps.content: The line of best fit decreases from left to right, so its slope is negative. That eliminates the positive choices.

steps.title: Estimate the line slope
steps.content:
Using two clear points on the line, the vertical change is about $-10$ for a horizontal change of about $3$:
$$\frac{\text{rise}}{\text{run}}=\frac{-10}{3}$$This is close to $-3.3$. The answer is A.
